text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It happened again... Today's Bakushin was far
from what I envisioned!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I wonder what happened to my legs...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Could it be I'll be stuck like this forever? An
Umamusume who can't set an example for
anyone?!
choice_data_list: It's not like you to be so down!
It's not like you to be so down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Could it be I'll be stuck like this forever? An
Umamusume who can't set an example for
anyone?!
choice_data_list: It's not like you to be so down!
It's not like you to be so down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your level of enthusiasm is on a different level! As
is your dependability! Like a divine entity sent to
cheer me up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's just as you said. Bakushin comes
naturally to me! Yep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! If today is no good, there's always
tomorrow! Let's go! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was dangerous! I was moments away from
being swallowed up by a turf monster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Vile monster! Are you trying to test the class
representative?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'll crush any evil monsters with my
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be a god or a demon king! I'll put an
end to them with my Bakushin!
